name: The End Of A Corridor
description:
You are at the end of a corridor that is in the second floor, and you are
glad that you dint see not even one bench. Far to the north you can see a
street where many carriages are passing, it must be a carriage station. 
From here you can pass to the other corridor at east, or enter to what it 
looks to be a room that is at you west.
